Package microui.core

Class TextEditorModel

java.lang.Object
microui.core.TextEditorModel
public final class TextEditorModel extends Object
A comprehensive text editor model that manages multi-line text editing operations, cursor positioning, and text selection. Provides a complete API for text manipulation in a multi-line editing environment.

This model is designed to be used by text editing UI components that need sophisticated text manipulation capabilities.

  • Nested Class Summary

    Nested Classes
    Modifier and Type
    Class
    Description
    static enum 
    TextEditorModel.Direction
    Provides constants for cursor direction

    Checks if the cursor is at the end of the current line.

    Checks if the cursor is at the end of all lines (last row).

    Checks if the cursor is at the end of the text (last row, end of last line).

    Checks if the cursor is at the start of the current line (column 0).

    Checks if the cursor is at the start of all lines (first row).

    Checks if the cursor is at the start of the text (row 0, column 0).

    Sets the text content from an array of strings (each string becomes a line).

    Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object

    equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait

  • Constructor Details

    • TextEditorModel

      public TextEditorModel()
      Constructs a TextEditorModel with empty text content. Initializes the underlying controller, cursor, selection, and text fragment components.

  • Method Details

    • undo

      public void undo()
      Undoes the last text modification.

    • redo

      public void redo()
      Redoes the last undone text modification.

    • getText

      public String getText()
      Gets the complete text content as a single string with line separators.
      Returns:
      the complete text content

    • getTextUntilCursor

      public String getTextUntilCursor()
      Gets the text content from the beginning up to the current cursor position.
      Returns:
      the text before the cursor

    • getTextAfterCursor

      public String getTextAfterCursor()
      Gets the text content from the current cursor position to the end.
      Returns:
      the text after the cursor

    • setText

      public void setText(String... text)
      Sets the text content from an array of strings (each string becomes a line).
      Parameters:
      text - the lines of text to set

    • insertChar

      public void insertChar(char ch)
      Inserts a character at the current cursor position.
      Parameters:
      ch - the character to insert

    • insertString

      public void insertString(String text)
      Inserts a string at the current cursor position.
      Parameters:
      text - the string to insert

    • removeChar

      public void removeChar()
      Removes the character at the current cursor position. Does nothing if the text is blank.

    • insertLine

      public void insertLine(String text)
      Inserts a new line with the specified text at the current cursor row.
      Parameters:
      text - the text for the new line

    • addLine

      public void addLine(String text)
      Adds a new line with the specified text at the end of the text.
      Parameters:
      text - the text for the new line

    • clear

      public void clear()
      Clears all text content.

    • isBlank

      public boolean isBlank()
      Checks if the text content is blank (empty).
      Returns:
      true if the text is blank, false otherwise

    • splitLine

      public void splitLine()
      Splits the current line at the cursor position, creating a new line.

    • mergeLines

      public void mergeLines()
      Merges the current line with the next line. The cursor row must not be the last line.

    • getLineText

      public String getLineText(int row)
      Gets the text of a specific line.
      Parameters:
      row - the line index (0-based)
      Returns:
      the text of the specified line

    • getLineLength

      public int getLineLength(int row)
      Gets the length (number of characters) of a specific line.
      Parameters:
      row - the line index (0-based)
      Returns:
      the length of the specified line

    • getLineCount

      public int getLineCount()
      Gets the total number of lines in the text.
      Returns:
      the count of lines

    • moveCursorTo

      public void moveCursorTo(TextEditorModel.Direction direction, int repeat)
      Moves the cursor in the specified direction by the specified number of steps.
      Parameters:
      direction - the direction to move (LEFT, UP, RIGHT, DOWN)
      repeat - the number of steps to move

    • moveCursorTo

      public void moveCursorTo(TextEditorModel.Direction direction)
      Moves the cursor one step in the specified direction.
      Parameters:
      direction - the direction to move (LEFT, UP, RIGHT, DOWN)

    • moveCursorTo

      public void moveCursorTo(int row, int column)
      Moves the cursor to the specified row and column.
      Parameters:
      row - the target row (0-based)
      column - the target column (0-based)

    • moveCursorToStartOfText

      public void moveCursorToStartOfText()
      Moves the cursor to the start of the text (row 0, column 0).

    • moveCursorToEndOfText

      public void moveCursorToEndOfText()
      Moves the cursor to the end of the text (last row, end of last line).

    • moveCursorToStartOfLine

      public void moveCursorToStartOfLine()
      Moves the cursor to the start of the current line (column 0).

    • moveCursorToEndOfLine

      public void moveCursorToEndOfLine()
      Moves the cursor to the end of the current line.

    • getCursorColumn

      public int getCursorColumn()
      Gets the current cursor column (0-based).
      Returns:
      the current column position

    • setCursorColumn

      public void setCursorColumn(int column)
      Sets the cursor column position.
      Parameters:
      column - the column to set (will be constrained to valid range)

    • getCursorRow

      public int getCursorRow()
      Gets the current cursor row (0-based).
      Returns:
      the current row position

    • setCursorRow

      public void setCursorRow(int row)
      Sets the cursor row position.
      Parameters:
      row - the row to set (will be constrained to valid range)

    • cursorAtStartOfLines

      public boolean cursorAtStartOfLines()
      Checks if the cursor is at the start of all lines (first row).
      Returns:
      true if cursor is on the first row, false otherwise

    • cursorAtEndOfLines

      public boolean cursorAtEndOfLines()
      Checks if the cursor is at the end of all lines (last row).
      Returns:
      true if cursor is on the last row, false otherwise

    • cursorAtStartOfLine

      public boolean cursorAtStartOfLine()
      Checks if the cursor is at the start of the current line (column 0).
      Returns:
      true if cursor is at column 0, false otherwise

    • cursorAtEndOfLine

      public boolean cursorAtEndOfLine()
      Checks if the cursor is at the end of the current line.
      Returns:
      true if cursor is at the line end, false otherwise

    • cursorAtStartOfText

      public boolean cursorAtStartOfText()
      Checks if the cursor is at the start of the text (row 0, column 0).
      Returns:
      true if cursor is at the absolute start, false otherwise

    • cursorAtEndOfText

      public boolean cursorAtEndOfText()
      Checks if the cursor is at the end of the text (last row, end of last line).
      Returns:
      true if cursor is at the absolute end, false otherwise

    • getSelectionStartRow

      public int getSelectionStartRow()
      Gets the selection start row.
      Returns:
      the selection start row

    • setSelectionStartRow

      public void setSelectionStartRow(int startRow)
      Sets the selection start row.
      Parameters:
      startRow - the start row to set (will be constrained to valid range)

    • getSelectionEndRow

      public int getSelectionEndRow()
      Gets the selection end row.
      Returns:
      the selection end row

    • setSelectionEndRow

      public void setSelectionEndRow(int endRow)
      Sets the selection end row.
      Parameters:
      endRow - the end row to set (will be constrained to valid range)

    • getSelectionStartColumn

      public int getSelectionStartColumn()
      Gets the selection start column.
      Returns:
      the selection start column

    • setSelectionStartColumn

      public void setSelectionStartColumn(int startColumn)
      Sets the selection start column.
      Parameters:
      startColumn - the start column to set (will be constrained to valid range)

    • getSelectionEndColumn

      public int getSelectionEndColumn()
      Gets the selection end column.
      Returns:
      the selection end column

    • setSelectionEndColumn

      public void setSelectionEndColumn(int endColumn)
      Sets the selection end column.
      Parameters:
      endColumn - the end column to set (will be constrained to valid range)

    • getSelectionEffectiveStartColumn

      public int getSelectionEffectiveStartColumn()
      Gets the effective start column (minimum of start and end columns).
      Returns:
      the effective start column

    • getSelectionEffectiveEndColumn

      public int getSelectionEffectiveEndColumn()
      Gets the effective end column (maximum of start and end columns).
      Returns:
      the effective end column

    • isMultiLineSelected

      public boolean isMultiLineSelected()
      Checks if the selection spans multiple lines.
      Returns:
      true if selection spans multiple lines, false for single-line selection

    • getSelectionEffectiveStartRow

      public int getSelectionEffectiveStartRow()
      Gets the effective start row (minimum of start and end rows).
      Returns:
      the effective start row

    • getSelectionEffectiveEndRow

      public int getSelectionEffectiveEndRow()
      Gets the effective end row (maximum of start and end rows).
      Returns:
      the effective end row

    • setSelectionStart

      public void setSelectionStart(int row, int column)
      Sets the selection start position.
      Parameters:
      row - the start row
      column - the start column

    • setSelectionEnd

      public void setSelectionEnd(int row, int column)
      Sets the selection end position.
      Parameters:
      row - the end row
      column - the end column

    • setSelection

      public void setSelection(int startRow, int endRow, int startColumn, int endColumn)
      Sets the complete selection range.
      Parameters:
      startRow - the start row
      endRow - the end row
      startColumn - the start column
      endColumn - the end column

    • hasSelection

      public boolean hasSelection()
      Checks if any text is currently selected.
      Returns:
      true if text is selected, false otherwise

    • selectAll

      public void selectAll()
      Selects all text in the document.

    • resetSelection

      public void resetSelection()
      Clears the current selection (sets to empty selection at position 0,0).

    • setOnSelectingListener

      public void setOnSelectingListener(Listener listener)
      Sets a listener to be notified when selection changes.
      Parameters:
      listener - the selection change listener

    • getSelectedText

      public String getSelectedText()
      Gets the currently selected text.
      Returns:
      the selected text, or empty string if nothing is selected

    • removeSelectedText

      public void removeSelectedText()
      Removes the currently selected text. If no text is selected, does nothing. After removal, the cursor is positioned at the start of the removed selection.

    • setOnTextChangedListener

      public void setOnTextChangedListener(Listener onTextChangedListener)
      Sets a listener to be notified when the text content changes.
      Parameters:
      onTextChangedListener - the text change listener
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if the listener is null
